Application Under Review

Your vendor application has been received. Our team will review it within 24–48 hours. You'll receive an email once approved.

@for (step of [ {label: 'Application submitted', done: true}, {label: 'Under admin review', done: false, active: true}, {label: 'Account activated', done: false}, ]; track step.label) {
@if (step.done) { check } @else if (step.active) {
}
{{ step.label }}
